label: 412_akhtar aziz_zeti akhtar_zeti_akhtar
description: Dr Zeti Akhtar Aziz, Governor of the Central Bank of Malaysia, delivered keynotes on Asia's economic prospects, emerging markets, and leadership in finance at conferences in India and the Philippines.
